story.conflict_tension: Which parts of Will AI Replace Graphic Designers? will humans still own after AI adoption?
story.visual_hook: Screen or workflow detail showing AI changing Will AI Replace Graphic Designers? in real time.
story.style_direction: premium documentary realism for vertical 9:16 YouTube Shorts. Mood: tense hopeful. Pacing: hook in first second, payoff before loop point. continuity_anchors.palette: neutral documentary color grade with selective warmth

clip_beats: Introduce the digital creator at their modern desk, showing their laptop and graphic design tools. Present the question: Will AI replace graphic designers? Highlight current AI tools influencing the workflow.

Demonstrate step-by-step how AI assists in graphic design tasks—generating concepts, automating repetitive work, and enhancing creativity—while the creator interacts with the AI tools on screen, highlighting replace.

Show a side-by-side comparison of AI-generated and human-refined designs. Conclude with practical insights on which design aspects AI can handle and which require human expertise, emphasizing collaboration over replacement, highlighting graphic.
